contributions.title: First-Inning Leak Rate
contributions.subtitle: Share of runs allowed in the opening frame.

contributions.title: First-Inning Leaks
contributions.subtitle: Runs allowed in the opening frame.

contributions.title: Butterfingers Club
contributions.subtitle: Fielding errors charged on defense.

contributions.title: Meatballs Served Hot
contributions.subtitle: Hits allowed on meatball pitches put in play.

contributions.title: First Pitch Whiff Rate (Pitching)
contributions.subtitle: Swinging strikes induced on the first pitch.

contributions.title: First Pitch HR Rate Allowed
contributions.subtitle: Home runs allowed per first pitch put in play.

contributions.title: First Pitch AVG Against
contributions.subtitle: Opponent batting average when putting the first pitch in play.

contributions.title: First Pitch SLG Against
contributions.subtitle: Opponent slugging when putting the first pitch in play.

contributions.title: First Pitch Fouls Induced
contributions.subtitle: Fouls induced on the first pitch.

contributions.title: First Pitch Strike Rate (Pitching)
contributions.subtitle: Share of first pitches that are strikes thrown by the staff.

contributions.title: First Pitch In-Play Allowed
contributions.subtitle: How often opponents put the first pitch in play.

contributions.title: Contact Allowed Rate
contributions.subtitle: Share of pitches the staff allows in play.

contributions.title: GIDP Inducers
contributions.subtitle: Double plays turned on opposing batters.

contributions.title: Meatball Rate
contributions.subtitle: Share of pitches thrown that were meatballs.

contributions.title: Meatballs Thrown
contributions.subtitle: Heart-of-zone pitches served up by the staff.

contributions.title: First Pitch Steal Strikes
contributions.subtitle: Called strikes induced on the first pitch.

contributions.title: Pitches Per Hit Allowed
contributions.subtitle: How many pitches the staff throws per hit allowed.

contributions.title: Pitches Per Run Allowed
contributions.subtitle: How many pitches the staff throws per run allowed.

contributions.title: Pitches Thrown Per Half
contributions.subtitle: Average pitches the staff throws per defensive half inning.

contributions.title: First Pitch Ball Rate (Pitching)
contributions.subtitle: Share of first pitches that are balls (1-0 counts gifted).

contributions.title: Error Run Donors
contributions.subtitle: Runs allowed on plays with an error.

contributions.title: Launching Pad Arms
contributions.subtitle: Throwing errors on defense.

contributions.title: Hardest Hit Allowed
contributions.subtitle: Highest exit velocity surrendered on contact.
